package rulecoverage

func NegativeBase64EncodeToStringInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "base64_encode_to_string_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Base64 encoding to string inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
